---
title: "Less is more"
listing:
  contents: posts/**/*.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
comments: false
toc: true
---

## Recent posts

::: {#posts}
:::

Click to my Chinese blog [here](https://guozheng.rbind.io).
